name: accounting firms processing 5–15 clients/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 5–15 clients/month, manual calculations cause delays in reporting. We automate depreciation schedule generation instead of manual calculations and spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Manual generation of depreciation schedules is time-consuming and prone to errors.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual generation of depreciation schedules is time-consuming and prone to errors.
